name: Green Bond Basic Yield Calculation
short_description: Calculates the total interest earned on a green bond investment over a specified period, compounded annually.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: The initial investment amount in the green bond.

inputs.name: yield_rate
inputs.description: The annual yield rate of the bond, expressed as a percentage.

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: The time period of the investment in years.

name: Green Bond Tax Incentive Calculation (Basic)
short_description: Calculates the net benefit from a green bond investment, including compounded interest and a tax credit on the interest earned.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: The initial investment amount in the green bond.

inputs.name: coupon_rate
inputs.description: The annual coupon rate of the green bond in percent (e.g., 5 for 5%).

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: The number of years the green bond is held.

inputs.name: tax_credit_rate
inputs.description: The tax credit rate applied to the interest earned, in percent (e.g., 10 for 10%).

name: Green Bond Synergy Benefit Calculation
short_description: Calculates the total net benefit to an investor from a green bond, including compound interest and a synergy bonus based on cost savings.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: Initial investment in the green bond

inputs.name: coupon_rate
inputs.description: Annual coupon rate as a percentage

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: Number of years the bond is held

inputs.name: annual_savings
inputs.description: Annual cost savings due to energy efficiency measures

inputs.name: bonus_rate
inputs.description: Synergy bonus amount per $500 saved annually

name: Green Bond Financing Cost Reduction
short_description: Calculates the reduction in financing cost for a green bond due to a discounted interest rate, by comparing compound interest with original and adjusted rates.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: Principal amount of the bond

inputs.name: coupon_rate
inputs.description: Annual coupon rate of the bond, in percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%)

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: Maturity period of the bond in years

inputs.name: discount
inputs.description: Reduction in the effective interest rate, in percentage points (e.g., 0.5 for a 0.5% reduction)

name: Green Bond Comprehensive Benefit Analysis
short_description: Analyzes the comprehensive benefits of a green bond investment, including compound interest, tax credits on interest, synergy bonuses from energy savings, and gains from reinvested interest.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: Initial investment principal for the green bond

inputs.name: coupon_rate
inputs.description: Annual coupon rate of the bond as a percentage

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: Investment duration in years

inputs.name: tax_credit_rate
inputs.description: Tax credit rate on interest earned as a percentage

inputs.name: annual_savings
inputs.description: Annual energy cost savings achieved by the company

inputs.name: synergy_bonus_rate
inputs.description: Bonus amount received per $500 of annual energy savings

inputs.name: reinvestment_percentage
inputs.description: Percentage of annual interest that is reinvested

inputs.name: reinvestment_rate
inputs.description: Additional annual growth rate for reinvested amounts as a percentage
